place: Uluwatu, Pecatu, South Kuta, Badung Regency, Bali, Indonesia
title: Seven-Bedroom Clifftop Villa with Ocean Views on Four Levels - Uluwatu
note: All-inclusive · full staff & private chef · WiFi included
blurb: A seven-bedroom villa set into the Uluwatu cliffs on Bali's Bukit peninsula, arranged over four levels that each open to wide ocean views — with three pools and a jacuzzi, a spa and sauna, a fully equipped gym, a bar with a pool table and a karaoke room, and a resident team of chefs, butlers and concierge staff, sleeping up to fourteen.
detail:
Set into the cliffs of Uluwatu on Bali's Bukit peninsula, this seven-bedroom villa is built across four levels, each one opening to broad views over the Indian Ocean. The seven en-suite bedrooms sleep up to fourteen, which makes it a natural fit for extended families and groups travelling together, with living and dining spaces that step down toward the water and a poolside communal table for shared meals.

The villa is unusually well equipped for downtime without leaving the grounds: three swimming pools and a jacuzzi, a dedicated spa and sauna, a fully equipped gym, and a bar with a pool table and a karaoke room. Between the wellness spaces and the entertainment rooms, there is somewhere for everyone whether the day calls for a treatment, a workout or a long evening in.

A full resident team looks after the stay — chefs and cooks, butlers and on-site concierge — and rates are all-inclusive of the whole villa, its pools, staff service and WiFi. The clifftop setting keeps the villa private while the beaches, surf breaks and clifftop restaurants of the Bukit are a short drive away.

features.l: Ocean views from all four levels
Bar with pool table & karaoke room
